targets.query: SELECT last("value") FROM "wattmon_std_mv" WHERE ("did" =~ /.*Inv*./ AND "f" =~ /.*Current_String*./ AND value > 0 AND "dlid" = '9C956E78E40E') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(15m, -330m), "did", "f" fill(null)
